mxCell.value: Activity Diagram — Alur Utama SIMHPSB (Pembelian Gabah → Giling → Distribusi → Alert)
Terima Notifikasi Alert (via Push Notif / Dashboard)
Input Data Pembelian Gabah ke Sistem
Simpan Gabah di Gudang (Kapasitas maks 2.000 kg)
Input Data Hasil Giling (tonase gabah → beras)
Simpan Beras Siap Edar (Kapasitas maks 1.000 kg)
Validasi & Simpan Data Pembelian Gabah (FR-07, FR-08)
Hitung Konversi Otomatis estimasi_beras = tonase × 0.615 POST /api/panen (FR-04, FR-05)
Catat Distribusi & Update Stok Keluar POST /api/distribusi (FR-07, FR-18)
Update Dashboard Monitoring Real-time (FR-15, FR-16, FR-17)
Atur Konfigurasi Harga PUT /api/harga (FR-11 s.d. FR-14)
Pantau Dashboard (Stok vs Target 9.000 kg/bln Grafik tren, margin)
Kirim Order Beras (MBG: 155 kg/dapur/hari × 3 Toko: tidak rutin)
Buat Alert & Push Notif ke Admin (FR-19, FR-20) INSERT alert_log
